creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Closing overcome by events

- Original report for now unsupported 9.x-RELEASE PC-BSD release.

- Logs not provided, but likely similar to bug 197481 (post upgrade time change), additionally reproducible here with suspend/resume (update summary accordingly)

- Issue approximately intended behaviour: reporting consequences of clock skew, unlike bug 232914 which reports overflow.

Our apologies for not addressing your report earlier.
